title: add CUDA back as examples dependency

body:
## Purpose 
This PR adds 1-moment microphysocs scheme coupled to the grid mean atmos state.

Part of CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl#913  
Closes CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl#2103 

## To-do
- I'll test a longruns simulation in the next PR

## Content
- A single column test was added in the previous PR
- Documentation
- Code to couple the CloudMicrophysics.jl 1-moment tendencies to the state variables in ClimaAtmos

- [x] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: Add 1-moment microphysics
